summary: End-to-end testing of PT Sonar Nusantara Utama landing site. Backend (6/6 pytest tests pass): GET /api/, POST /api/contact (with valid/minimal payloads), GET /api/contact (data persistence), 422 rejection for invalid email and missing required fields. Frontend: all 8 routes load, hero & 3 unit cards render, language toggle EN<->ID works and persists to localStorage (sonar_lang), full navigation translates (Home->Beranda, Contact Our Team->Hubungi Tim Kami), Business overview alternating sections, Tech Distribution 3 segments, Marine 8-capabilities + 8-step Project Lifecycle, Digital Products 5 modules + 3 tiers with Professional highlighted (MOST POPULAR badge + ring + lifted card), Brands page with 3 groups, About with Vision/Mission/What We Do/Commitment sections. Contact form submission to /api/contact succeeded (200), success message shown, form resets. Mobile (375px) menu toggle opens nav with Business expandable submenu and lang-toggle-mobile present.

issues: Heading 'From planning to demobilization — we support every phase.' has color rgb(7,30,61) on background rgb(7,30,61) — IDENTICAL dark navy, making heading completely invisible. Visible as blank space between 'PROJECT LIFECYCLE' eyebrow and the 8-step diagram. Likely missing 'text-white' class on the H2 inside the dark navy section.
Similar pattern may exist on other dark sections — recommend audit of all h2/h3 inside .bg-[#071E3D] blocks.

Spec requires data-testid='form-error' to be shown on empty submit. Current implementation relies on HTML5 'required' attribute validation only (4 invalid fields detected). The form-error testid never appears for the empty-required case (only for API failure). Minor: works functionally but doesn't meet the explicit spec contract.

action_items: Fix invisible heading on /business/marine-project-support inside Project Lifecycle dark section — add text-white (or light-color) class to the H2.
(Optional) Render data-testid='form-error' element on empty-required-field submit in Contact.jsx to match spec contract (e.g., set state before relying purely on HTML5 required).

Code-quality nit: server.py uses `logger.info(...)` inside POST /api/contact at line 88 but `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` is defined at line 112 (after the route definitions). Works at runtime due to module-level resolution but is fragile — move logger initialization above the routes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger defined AFTER routes that use it (line 112 vs line 88). Move logger setup to top of file (right after imports) — fragile pattern.
server.py: contact endpoint returns the inquiry but doesn't return 201 Created — using 200 is acceptable but 201 is more REST-conventional for POST creation.
server.py: No rate limiting / spam protection on POST /api/contact — public endpoint vulnerable to abuse.
server.py: EmailStr is used on create model but stored as plain `str` in DB model — fine, but consider validating on storage too.
Frontend: input-inquiry-type uses native <select> rather than shadcn Select — fine but inconsistent with premium design language.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all functional flows pass; 1 critical design contrast bug + 1 minor spec deviation on form-error)

test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_-prefixed contact inquiries via POST /api/contact during testing (visible in GET /api/contact). Safe to leave or clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 routes verified loadable on https://sonar-tech-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_contact_api.py — re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_contact_api.py -v. Language toggle uses localStorage key 'sonar_lang' with values 'en'/'id'. Inquiry-type select options: ['Technology Distribution', 'Marine Project Support', 'Digital Product', 'Equipment Rental', 'Offshore Personnel', 'Partnership', 'Other']. Contact form Success text: 'Thank you. Our team will get back to you shortly.' (EN). Main remaining issue: invisible H2 on Marine Project Lifecycle section — easy fix.
rca_of_the_issue: MARINE PAGE INVISIBLE HEADING: The dark navy section (#071E3D background) containing PROJECT LIFECYCLE eyebrow + main H2 + 8-step diagram inherits the default text color #071E3D from the page/section base. The 8 step labels appear in white but the section H2 was not given an explicit text-white class. Reproduction: navigate to /business/marine-project-support, scroll to the dark navy section between the capabilities grid and the CTA. Expected: visible white heading describing the lifecycle. Actual: blank space (text-color === bg-color). Mitigation: add `text-white` (or `text-[#F5F7FA]`) to the H2 inside the lifecycle section of MarineProjectSupport.jsx.
